title: Ubiquiti UACC-OM-MM-1G-D-20 (UF-MM-1G-20) - U Fiber, Multi-Mode Module, 1G, 20-Pack
category: Ubiquiti / Optical networks / SFP optical modules / SFP
description: UF-MM-1G is multimode 1G SFP module with 2 LC connectors. Wave length is 850nm and it is suitable for distances up to 550m . Module is compatible with all Ubiquiti products which contain SFP ports. Package contains 20 pieces
specsSearch: Optics Format SFP For cable type Multi Mode Transmission speed 1 Gbps Wavelength - Tx/Rx [nm] 850 Distance [km] 0,55 Transfer type 2-fiber Connectors and Interfaces Optical Connectors (2) LC General Compatibility Universal
